meta.title: Sekura — Personal Safety App for Women & Travelers | Discrete SOS & AI Heatmap
meta.description: Sekura protects women and travelers in real time. Discrete triple-click SOS, AI risk zone heatmap, safe navigation. Free forever. Join the beta.
meta.og_title: Sekura — Your invisible shield. Everywhere. Always.
meta.og_description: The digital bodyguard for women, travelers and families. SOS in 3 clicks, AI risk heatmap, safe navigation. Free forever.

hero.description: The digital bodyguard for women, travelers and families. SOS in 3 clicks, AI risk zone heatmap, safe navigation — available everywhere in the world.

how.title: 3 steps. Under 60 seconds.
how.subtitle: You don't need to change your behavior. Sekura adapts to your life, not the other way around.
how.step1_desc: Add your 5 trusted contacts. Sekura automatically sends them an SMS with the tracking link. No app needed on their end.
how.step2_desc: Before going out, check the real-time risk zones around you. Activate safe navigation for your route.
how.step3_desc: Triple-click the volume button = instant silent SOS. Your exact GPS location is sent to your contacts. No need to look at the screen.

problem.title: Insecurity isn't a problem
problem.subtitle: No tool has been designed for this reality — until today.
problem.stat1_title: women have changed their route out of fear
problem.stat1_desc: In France, the UK, Spain, Colombia, Brazil — the fear of walking alone at night is universal.
problem.stat1_src: Source · High Council for Equality · France 2024
problem.stat2_title: most dangerous cities are in LATAM
problem.stat2_desc: 12M European tourists visit Latin America without knowing the local risk geography.
problem.stat3_desc: In 30 minutes, everything can be too late. You need to alert your contacts in seconds — without anyone around noticing.
problem.stat4_title: app truly built for these realities
problem.stat4_desc: Life360, bSafe, Noonlight: built for the US market. No SOS without looking at the screen, no local heatmap.

features.title: The protection that people who can afford
features.f1_desc: Living map updated every 2 minutes. Analyzes community reports + local incidents + local press. 50m × 50m granularity. Available worldwide.
features.f1_b1: Zones color-coded by real-time risk level
features.f1_b3: Available for any city worldwide at launch
features.f2_title: SOS without looking at the screen
features.f2_desc: Triple-click the volume button = instant silent SOS. 5 contacts alerted with exact GPS by notification + SMS. Nothing on screen. Nobody around sees it.
features.f2_b1: Activatable with hand in pocket, bag closed
features.f2_b2: No data shown on screen during the alert
features.f2_b3: SMS sent even without the app on contacts' phones
features.f3_desc: The route that avoids active risk zones, updated in real time. Not the shortest path — the safest path.
features.f3_b1: Automatic recalculation if a zone becomes dangerous
features.f3_b2: Preventive alerts before entering a risk zone
features.f3_b3: Night mode — risk profile adapted to late hours
features.f4_desc: Powered by Claude (Anthropic). Answers your security questions in local context — your city, tonight, right now.
features.f4_b1: Local knowledge: neighborhoods, risks, scams to avoid
features.f4_b2: Natively integrated with heatmap and navigation
features.f4_b3: Available in French, Spanish, Portuguese, English

faq.title: We answer your questions.
faq.q1: How does SOS work without looking at the screen?
faq.a1: You triple-click the physical volume button on your phone, in sleep mode or in your pocket. Sekura detects this pattern and silently sends your exact GPS location to your 5 trusted contacts by push notification AND SMS. Nothing appears on the screen.
faq.q2: Do my contacts need to have the app?
faq.a2: No. Your contacts receive an SMS with a tracking link that opens directly in their browser. No installation required. They see your real-time location on a secure web map.
faq.q3: Is the heatmap available for my city?
faq.a3: Yes. The heatmap is available for any city worldwide at launch. Priority cities: CDMX, Medellín, São Paulo, Bogotá, Paris, London.
faq.q4: What happens if I have no internet connection?
faq.a4: The SOS works offline via SMS. Sekura uses the classic GSM phone network to send an alert message with your last known GPS position. Perfect for rural areas, the Amazon, the Andes.
faq.a5: All location data is end-to-end encrypted (E2E). It is never shared with third parties, never sold. You can delete all your data at any time. Sekura is GDPR compliant.
faq.q6: When does the app launch? On which platforms?
faq.a6: Sekura launches in closed beta in Q3 2025 on iOS and Android. The first 500 whitelist signups get priority access and 3 months of Smart Safety free. Public launch Q4 2025 in Europe and Latin America.

cta.subtitle: The first 500 signups get 3 months of Smart Safety free + closed beta access. No credit card. Unsubscribe in 1 click.

footer.desc: The digital bodyguard for women, travelers and families — in Europe, Latin America, everywhere you go.
